name: aether-kurikulum
description: Comprehensive school management system plugin for Indonesian educational institutions. Manages students, teachers, classes, assessments, report cards (rapor), and academic terms with full RBAC support.

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Manage student records with NISN, personal info, and enrollment status

features.name: Teacher Management
features.description: Manage teacher records with NIP, subjects, and class assignments

features.name: Class Management
features.description: Organize classes by grade level with promotion workflows

features.name: Report Cards (Rapor)
features.description: Generate and manage academic report cards with full curriculum support

features.name: Assessment Engine
features.description: Create and manage exams, seating arrangements, and supervisor schedules

features.name: RBAC Security
features.description: Role-based access control for Kepala Sekolah, Admin, Guru, and Operators
